languages.text: "Сегодня Изимонд нес вахту на заставе лишь со своими людьми".

traits.locale_text: "Сегодня Изимонд нес вахту на заставе лишь со своими людьми".

languages.text: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."

languages.text: “今天在前哨值守的，只有苏尔贝克和他的人。”
languages.original_text: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."

languages.text: « Sauerback était de garde à l'avant-poste aujourd'hui, seul avec ses hommes. »
languages.original_text: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."

languages.text: "Bugün Sauerback, yalnızca kendi adamlarıyla karakolda nöbetteydi."

languages.text: «Sauerback estaba hoy de guardia en el puesto avanzado, acompañado tan solo por los suyos».
languages.original_text: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."

languages.text: "Sauerback hat den Außenposten heute nur mit seinen Leuten bewacht."
languages.original_text: "Sauerback was on guard at the outpost today with only his people."

languages.text: 「ソーアバックは、今日は自分の部下だけで、その砦で警備をしていた」
